This is how our OTO Bump script typically works. The very first section of it is, let me just put it there live. The very first thing I'm doing is I'm confirming their initial decision. Congratulations, thank you so much for ordering your very first bottle of sassy grass. I probably should put this in there because the other thing is I need to keep that loop open. I might add that to the graphic. So I'm confirming the initial decision and keeping the loop open. So congratulations on buying your very first bottle of sassy grass. You were going to love it, but don't go anywhere because your order is not yet completed. Remember talking about that yesterday, two days ago, how if I close the loop, the conversions drop. So I want to keep that loop open, so I might add that. The second part of the script is like, before you go on, I want to find out if you'd be interested in, this is called the 3x2x, which basically stands for, I'm going to 3x results twice as fast. So you bought this because you're trying to get more healthy. I'm going to show you a really quick way to get three times the results, sorry, three times results in half as long, twice the speed. So I'm usually, and again, this will tweak depending on if your upsell is not necessarily speeding up their process, but most good upsells, you're going to take whatever they bought to the next level. It's the next thing we talked about. So you just bought this thing, I'm going to show you how to do this better, faster, whatever. Then I come back, and now I have to come back to them, and I want to make them feel really, really good about the initial purchase, because the worst thing an upsell can do, and I've seen this happen all the time, people are like, you just bought this thing, but it doesn't actually work unless you buy this next thing. Best way to make your customers want to kill you really, really fast. And people do it all the time, it just drives me crazy. So I want to make sure that they realize that what they just bought was amazing, it is going to change your life like I told them initially, and so I want to confirm that. So you are one of the smartest people in the world, and the reason why is because you saw the value of what Sassay and Grasky do for you, you saw how the benefits, you saw how it's going to help your family, you saw all this stuff. You're really, really smart, but I want to ask you a question, how would you like to have me help you do it faster or better? How would you like to have more information? How would you like to do whatever the next thing is? I'm introducing that. Then I come back, and I want to make them feel special, and they should feel special, and they offer you're making them on this page should be special. If they can buy the same thing, there's actually a price somewhere else that's not right. That's what we call these special one-time offers. One of the worst things I think you can do, I've had three or four people ask me this weekend, I keep selling them my offers if they miss it. I don't do that because I feel like this is a special one-time offer that they get right now. So I make them a really good offer right now, and so I tell them this is an exclusive offer just for people who bought Dotcom's Secret Slabs. This is an exclusive offer only for people who just bought Sassay Grask. I want them to feel exclusive. This is the cool thing that nobody else is getting. I like even going to the point of saying, in fact, if you go to whatever.com, you'll see I sell this normally for this price. But because you're here right now, I got this exclusive deal, this exclusive price, and you're going to love it. So your upsells convert really well. Then I transition over to what makes this upsell better. Usually it's something that's going to make you get your end goal faster, you get better results, whatever it might be, whatever that next thing is going to do for them. This is what we tell you. This is all the stuff that's going to get. Now I introduce what's the one thing the upsell is going to do. What's the one core thing of the upsell? Very simple. If you get this upsell, for Dotcom's Secret Slabs, a big thing is you were smart because you knew you needed faster to increase your conversions. But the best way to increase your conversions or the best way to make more money is to start getting more traffic to your website. I'm going to show you guys a way to get more traffic faster, better, easier. That's what we're going to do. The one thing I'm going to show you guys now is how to get more traffic through my new traffic program, whatever it is. My folks down the one thing, and I share this is what that one thing is. It's going to be more traffic, it's going to be better traffic, and I explain what that is and why it's exciting and why they need it. Then after I introduce that one thing again, then I come back to future casting. Can you guys imagine what it's going to do for your business? Well, literally you're able to double the traffic you get without spending any more time or energy or effort. What will that do for you? How much more money can you make from that? What about extra money? Whose life can you affect? How many more people can you help? Whatever your goals are, what can you do with that? So I future cast again, then I come down and give it a call to action. So all you got to do to add this to your order right now is click on this button and instantly will add this to your order and you get it right away. Call to action. Then I come back, I guarantee again. Don't worry, just like all my offers, you're a very special, you're a very cool guarantee. If you don't like it for whatever reason in the next 30 days, let me know. I won't bill you a penny. Also because you're taking action right now, I'm going to give you some more stuff. So here's a value stack. I'm also going to give you this and this and this. Again, just like the initial value stack, I'm not going to give them new things. I don't have time to explain all those things. This video needs to be more compact. But I'm saying what else can complement the one thing? Okay, I'm pushing to get this and this and this, really quick thing. But a nice amount of one-time offers of scarcity is built in. But this offer is only available right here right now on this page. If you ever wanted to get in the future, you got to go to my site over here where it's twice as much money. Or you got to rebuy this product completely. It's just like right now it's half off, but it's only half off right now. So if you leave this page, it's gone forever. Let me know if you want it right now. Okay, this is my scarcity. Then I give them a call to action again. And I'm not doing the five testimonials about this product. I'm doing a testimonial rush. And I'm so sure about it, excuse me, after the second call to action, then I'm like, let me show other people have had success this as well. And I show a couple of videos person after person after person after person after person. And then maybe I'll do one more call to action at the end and that's kind of it. You see how the sales process is a lot shorter? They already said yes. They already got sold in the concept. The idea, whatever it is, all I have to do is just show them enough value in this next thing, the next one thing, how it's going to help them achieve whatever they already are. They already committed to me that, hey Russell, I want to increase my conversions, which is going to make me more money. I made that commitment. If I already said the first yes, let me just say like, you got conversions, you want traffic? All right, cool. I'll get that as well. Let's say yes to that. Like, hey, do you want this as well? All right, sure. I'll do that as well. Okay? So that's kind of what we're doing is just increasing and making the initial purchase better. And so because that script is very short.
